subtitle_id: Kucing besar penjaga hutan Pulau Sumatra
subtitle_en: The big cat guarding Sumatra's forests

data_card.value_en: Males up to 250 cm, about 140 kg

data_card.value_id: Babi hutan, rusa, unggas, kadang ikan
data_card.value_en: Wild boar, deer, birds, sometimes fish

sections.body_id: Harimau sumatra adalah kucing besar yang hanya hidup di Pulau Sumatra, Indonesia. Ia adalah harimau paling kecil di antara semua jenis harimau di dunia. Tubuhnya yang mungil membuatnya gesit menjelajahi hutan. Ia satu-satunya harimau sunda yang masih hidup sampai sekarang, jadi sangat istimewa.
sections.body_en: The Sumatran tiger is a big cat that lives only on the island of Sumatra, Indonesia. It is the smallest of all tiger types in the world. Its small body makes it quick and nimble in the forest. It is the only Sunda tiger still alive today, which makes it very special.

sections.body_id: Harimau sumatra tinggal di hutan-hutan Pulau Sumatra. Ia bisa hidup di hutan dataran rendah, lahan gambut, sampai hutan hujan di pegunungan. Banyak yang tinggal di taman nasional dan cagar alam yang dilindungi. Di jari-jarinya ada selaput, jadi ia juga pandai berenang!
sections.body_en: The Sumatran tiger lives in the forests of Sumatra island. It can live in lowland forests, peat swamps, and rainforests high in the mountains. Many live in protected national parks and nature reserves. It has webbing between its toes, so it is also a great swimmer!

sections.body_id: Bulu harimau sumatra berwarna oranye tua dengan garis hitam yang lebar dan rapat. Warnanya paling gelap di antara semua harimau di dunia. Harimau jantan punya lebih banyak janggut dan surai di wajahnya. Loreng ini membantunya bersembunyi di balik bayang-bayang hutan, seperti pakaian penyamaran.
sections.body_en: The Sumatran tiger's fur is deep orange with wide, close-set black stripes. Its color is the darkest of all tigers in the world. Males have more beard and mane around the face. These stripes help it hide among the forest shadows, like a camouflage suit.

sections.body_id: Harimau sumatra adalah pemburu yang sabar dan pandai. Ia memakan babi hutan, rusa, kijang, unggas, dan kadang ikan. Sebagai pemangsa utama, ia menjaga jumlah hewan lain di hutan tetap seimbang. Induk harimau biasanya melahirkan 2 atau 3 anak yang sangat lucu dan dijaga dengan penuh kasih.
sections.body_en: The Sumatran tiger is a patient and clever hunter. It eats wild boar, deer, muntjac, birds, and sometimes fish. As a top predator, it keeps the number of other animals in the forest balanced. A mother tiger usually has 2 or 3 adorable cubs that she cares for lovingly.

sections.body_id: Harimau sumatra sangat langka, hanya tersisa sekitar 400-500 ekor di alam liar. Hutannya makin sempit karena ditebang untuk ladang dan kebun, sehingga ia sulit mencari rumah. Kita bisa membantu dengan menjaga hutan tetap lestari dan hijau. Dengan kerja sama, harimau gagah ini bisa terus hidup bahagia!
sections.body_en: The Sumatran tiger is very rare, with only about 400-500 left in the wild. Its forest is shrinking because it is cleared for fields and plantations, making it hard to find a home. We can help by keeping forests healthy and green. Working together, this brave tiger can keep living happily!

facts.id: Harimau sumatra adalah harimau terkecil di dunia!
facts.en: The Sumatran tiger is the smallest tiger in the world!

facts.id: Warna bulunya paling gelap di antara semua harimau.
facts.en: Its fur is the darkest of all tigers.

facts.id: Ada selaput di jari kakinya supaya bisa berenang cepat.
facts.en: It has webbed toes so it can swim fast.

facts.id: Loreng setiap harimau berbeda, seperti sidik jari manusia.
facts.en: Every tiger's stripes are unique, like a human fingerprint.

facts.id: Di alam liar, harimau sumatra bisa hidup sampai 15 tahun.
facts.en: In the wild, a Sumatran tiger can live up to 15 years.

facts.id: Anak harimau baru membuka matanya pada hari kesepuluh.
facts.en: Tiger cubs open their eyes on the tenth day.

glossary.def_id: Hewan atau tumbuhan yang hanya hidup di satu tempat khusus di dunia.
glossary.def_en: An animal or plant that lives in only one special place in the world.

glossary.def_id: Hewan pemburu di puncak rantai makanan yang tidak diburu hewan lain.
glossary.def_en: A top hunter at the head of the food chain that no other animal hunts.

glossary.def_id: Keadaan saat hewan sangat langka dan bisa hilang selamanya jika tidak dijaga.
glossary.def_en: When an animal is very rare and could disappear forever unless it is protected.

glossary.def_id: Tempat alami sebuah hewan tinggal, mencari makan, dan berkembang biak.
glossary.def_en: The natural place where an animal lives, finds food, and raises its young.

glossary.def_id: Warna atau pola tubuh yang membantu hewan menyatu dengan sekitarnya.
glossary.def_en: Body colors or patterns that help an animal blend into its surroundings.

gallery.caption_id: Harimau sumatra menatap dengan tenang sambil berbaring, memperlihatkan wajah dan loreng yang khas.
gallery.caption_en: A Sumatran tiger gazes calmly while resting, showing its distinctive face and stripes.

gallery.caption_id: Tubuh harimau yang gagah terlihat penuh saat ia berjalan di atas batu, lorengnya lebar dan rapat.
gallery.caption_en: The tiger's powerful body is shown in full as it walks across the rocks, its stripes wide and close-set.

gallery.caption_id: Wajah harimau dari dekat memperlihatkan kumis panjang dan janggut tebal khas harimau sumatra.
gallery.caption_en: A close-up of the tiger's face shows the long whiskers and thick beard typical of the Sumatran tiger.

gallery.caption_id: Seekor harimau sumatra melangkah di tanah terbuka dekat tepi hutan, gesit dan waspada.
gallery.caption_en: A Sumatran tiger steps across open ground near the forest edge, nimble and alert.
gallery.credit: Official Website of Ministry of Environment and Forestry Indonesia
